creator: delta@lackas.net
text:
Sorry, typo in the patch. Here is a fixed version:

--- Makefile.orig	Sun Jan 14 19:35:34 2007
+++ Makefile	Sun Jan 14 19:36:05 2007
@@ -6,8 +6,8 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	wml
-PORTVERSION=	2.0.9
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	2.0.11
+PORTREVISION=	0
 CATEGORIES=	www lang
 MASTER_SITES=	http://thewml.org/distrib/ \
 		ftp://thewml.org/distrib/
@@ -16,6 +16,7 @@
 COMMENT=	Website META Language, webdesign toolkit for HTML generation
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=	png.5:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/png
+BUILD_DEPENDS=   lynx:${PORTSDIR}/www/lynx
 
 USE_PERL5=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-perl=${PERL5}
--- distinfo    24 Jan 2006 03:14:16 -0000      1.34
+++ distinfo    31 Dec 2006 09:31:51 -0000
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (wml-2.0.9.tar.gz) = a7c9da3b58f7e40706e3c29c37b4822b
-SHA256 (wml-2.0.9.tar.gz) = 0d4b2fdf05c8a9597bcfbdcf34268d47f9c5846c62550b65eb5e7abfe89eaa89
-SIZE (wml-2.0.9.tar.gz) = 2570742
+MD5 (wml-2.0.11.tar.gz) = a26feebf4e59e9a6940f54c69dde05b5
+SHA256 (wml-2.0.11.tar.gz) = 8e11ef19ea67ff9c4b28ff0fcacf5098881ac0c5f09ddfe3abc29f1e12be5d4a
+SIZE (wml-2.0.11.tar.gz) = 3115230
